sentence_reviews.text: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Probability theory, Statistics & experimental design.

sentence_reviews.notes: The source supports surrogate losses and the dependencies, but not the strong claim that optimization can leave intended behavior unchanged or worse.
